title: [PyCDE] Integer outputs broken
body:
```python
from pycde import Input, Output, Module, System
from pycde import generator
from pycde.types import UInt


class AddInts(Module):
  a = Input(UInt(32))
  b = Input(UInt(32))
  c = Output(UInt(33))

  @generator
  def construct(self):
    self.c = self.a + self.b


system = System(AddInts)
system.generate()
system.print()
system.compile()
```

```
module {
  msft.module @AddInts {} (%a: ui32, %b: ui32) -> (c: ui33) attributes {fileName = "AddInts.sv"} {
    %0 = hwarith.add %a, %b {sv.namehint = "a_plus_b"} : (ui32, ui32) -> ui33
    msft.output %0 : ui33
  }
}
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/docs/PyCDE/examples/basic.py", line 19, in <module>
    system.compile()
  File "/home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/.venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pycde/system.py", line 314, in compile
    self.run_passes()
  File "/home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/.venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pycde/system.py", line 291, in run_passes
    pm.run(self.mod.operation)
pycde.circt._mlir_libs.MLIRError: Failure while executing pass pipeline:
error: "/home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/docs/PyCDE/examples/basic.py":12:0: null operand found
 note: "/home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/docs/PyCDE/examples/basic.py":12:0: see current operation: "msft.output"(<<NULL VALUE>>) : (<<NULL TYPE>>) -> ()
```
